## Overview

Quantization, distillation, KV-cache, speculative decoding techniques.

## Key Claims

- Inference cost can be reduced 4-8x with minimal quality loss.

## Evidence/Data

Benchmarks across GPT-4, Llama, and Mistral model families.

## Limitations

- Does not cover training-time optimizations.
